name: Potato 'n Broccoli Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip together the first five ingredients until smooth.
2. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Fold in half a can of onions.
4. Spread the potato mixture over the bottom and up the sides of a buttered 9 x 13 pan to form a shell.
5. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
6. Arrange hot broccoli spears in the potato shell; sprinkle with cheese and remaining onions.
7. Bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes.
